series_metadata.series_description: Prevailing wage documents are vendor payroll records of wages paid to contract employees who work on a capital project and/or public improvement project. These records include all disbursements of wages paid by contracted employees who are required to receive not less than the prevailing rate of wages.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: documents from commencement of capital projects and/or public improvement projects one year completion and successful completion of warranty inspection
